arts.sum: Rodgers chuckled: "Yeah the competition stops now, we play Bayern Munich in the final! Brendan Rodgers has joked he wants the Champions League to end NOW for Celtic to face Bayern Munich in the final.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers salutes 5 star Celtic then declares 'we're going to make this place a fortress'
arts.sum: Rodgers couldn't be happier with what he saw from his side in thier Champions League opener

arts.ttl: Celtic thrash Bratislava in UCL opener
arts.sum: Celtic kicked off their Champions League campaign with a 5-1 home thrashing of debutants Slovan Bratislava on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton brilliantly sums up just how good Wednesday night was for Celtic in Champions League
arts.sum: Bayern Munich currently sit at the top of the tree after their 9-2 result at home to Dinamo Zagreb and there are still six matches left to play on Thursday, but it’s a bit of fun for Celtic that sums up the majesty of tonight’s result. It is the Bhoys’ biggest-ever victory in the group stage of the Champions League and the first time that they’ve ever won on the opening night of a group stage.

arts.ttl: Stunning Celtic make Champions League history with Slovan Bratislava annihilation – 5 talking points
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers’ side hit five goals past Slovaks on raucous night at Celtic Park
